creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
please refrain from doing this:

+++ giacxcas/Makefile       2012-06-18 20:56:00.000000000 +0200
@@ -2,14 +2,13 @@
  # Date created:          2010-08-26
  # Whom:                     Frederic Han<han@math.jussieu.fr>

this means that the committer has to manually put this back in before he can begin testing.
this like is automatically generated and maintained by the ports cvs system, and is critical.
